description: Add 'bw archive'. Store: Archive(id, {Close,Detach}) moves issues/<id>.json -> archive/<id>.json, freezes status=closed, stamps archived_at, removes status/labels/blocks markers, detaches live graph edges (refuse if open dependents/children unless --detach), closes-if-open only with --close. Add Issue.ArchivedAt. Intent: 'archive <id> [--close] [--detach]' verb + replayArchive. Command: bw archive <id>... (direct) and bw archive --before <cutoff> (closed-only sweep via resolveDateBeforeNow, preview-by-default, --force to execute). Recap storeLookup.Title falls back to archive/. One-way (no unarchive). Stacked on beadwork-gxn/date-before-now.
title: Implement bw archive (single + --before sweep), intent replay, recap title fallback
